title: Confident and Humble at the Same Time
caption:
Confidence and humility aren't opposites. Most men just never see them in the same room.

The world sold you two options: be loud and sure of yourself, or be humble and small. A godly man doesn't pick one. He's settled enough in who he is in Christ that he doesn't need to prove it, and secure enough that being wrong doesn't threaten him.

He apologizes first. He serves rooms he could easily run. He kneels before he moves.

"Count others more significant than yourselves." — Philippians 2:3

That's not weakness dressed up. That's what strength actually looks like when it's real.

#faith #humility #confidence #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
